response: Alex resolved a total of 18 support tickets on that day. Out of 20 tickets, 40% (which is 8 tickets) were related to file access issues and all of them were resolved. Then, 35% (which is 7 tickets) were related to data security concerns, and all of those were also resolved. The remaining 25% (which is 5 tickets) were miscellaneous issues, and Alex resolved half of them, which is 2 tickets. Adding them up: 8 + 7 + 2 = 17. Wait, that’s 17. Let me double-check the math. 20 tickets total, 8 + 7 = 15, plus 2 from the miscellaneous issues gives 17. So Alex resolved 17 tickets in total. This highway was a bit tricky, but we made it through. It was a holiday, and another holiday came after.
